name: Heroic Assault
short_description: Heroic Assault is a reverse tower defense game where you prepare your army to go through the infested lands of defenses. Choose your units wisely depending on the layout of the defenses and equip them with unique abilities.
detailed_description:
Heroic Assault is a reverse tower defense strategy game set in a fantasy world. Strategically choose your best suited units before each battle in order to go through the infested lands and destroy the defenses, before reaching the evil lair. Unleash your army wave after wave until the defenses are overpowered.

Defeat the defenses on various layouts

Each level is built with specific challenges and will require a different setup of your army to go through. Various kinds of defenses and attack effects will bring you the best challenge, so it's up to you to decide the best strategy to move forward and claim the victory.

Improve your army

Use the meta progression system to unlock new units and improve their stats when you finish a level. Getting the best score will grant you more upgrades for the future levels!

Choose the best perks

During each battle, experience from each wave will allow you to adapt your units to the battle field through various upgrades and skills. Using synergies between units and their skills will be critical for the final victory.

supported_languages: English, French, Russian, Simplified Chinese, German, Spanish - Spain
